description_long: This is a long, narrow canal boat with a flat deck and a rectangular cabin structure running most of its length. The hull is predominantly dark blue with a green roof and red accents at the bow and stern. Circular porthole windows are evenly spaced along the sides, and the roof appears to be slightly raised in the middle section. The stern features a small open area with a metal railing and a tiller for steering, while the bow is enclosed and streamlined. The overall design suggests it is intended for calm, narrow waterways, typical of urban canals.
description: A long, narrow canal boat with a blue hull, green roof, red ends, and circular porthole windows along the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow with red accent and the narrow width of the boat.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, green roof, blue hull, red ends, and circular porthole windows.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stern's open area, red accent, and metal railing with tiller.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length, portholes, and color scheme.
